comments.author: Joe Oakhart
comments.body: FORCE_CLAIM: plan-review gate bypassed by user approval — no plan-review attestation was verified. Reason: "plan-review PASSED (signed, non-blocking) at origin/main 81a15f4d minutes ago; attestation staled only by this stack's own unrelated c366 commit advancing HEAD to 37ab727 (mechanical HEAD-freshness, not a plan change/BLOCK). Gate intent satisfied; claiming all before further commits.".

compiled_state.description:
## Why

`verify.require_signature_for_close` (default False, OFF in this project) is the
"signature close gate" — it requires an HMAC signature BEFORE closing a work ticket.
It is documented as the ALTERNATIVE to `require_completion_verification_for_close`,
which is what THIS project actually uses (enabling both deadlocks a non-force close).
It has never been used here and is a retired alternative. Remove it and the close-gate
code reachable ONLY through it.

## What

Delete (reachable only via this gate):
- `resolve_signature_gate` — `_commands/gates.py:58-80` (whole function).
- `_signature_gate` — `_commands/txn.py:311-410` (whole function) + its two CommandErrors
  ("requires a certified signature (verdict: …)" and the "made at a different commit"
  HEAD-binding error).
- `transition_core` plumbing: the `sig_require`/`sig_config_error` locals + the
  `resolve_signature_gate` call (`txn.py:182-187`) and the story/epic close-gate block
  (`txn.py:250-260`).
- Config field + validator (`_config_schema.py:210`, `:485`).
- True-path tests: `test_signature.py:312`, `test_close_gate_story_epic.py:38,116`,
  `test_idea_close_bypass.py:27` (rewrite — bypass logic changes); trim flag-specific
  assertions in `test_config_typed.py`, `test_config_perf.py`, `test_config_backcompat.py`;
  regenerate golden CLI help (`transition__*help.out`).

## Scope — MUST PRESERVE

The entire shared HMAC signing/attestation substrate: `signing.py` (`signing_key`,
`verify_record`, `most_recent_attestation`, `head_sha`, `verify_signature`), the
`attestations` map, `sign_manifest`/`verify_signature` MCP tools, and the
completion-verifier close path (`transition_close.py`) + plan-review claim gate — all
share this machinery and must keep working. `--force-close` and `--verdict-hash` are
NOT owned by this gate — keep both. Docs handled by the doc-sweep story.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `require_signature_for_close` removed from schema, parser, and any docs/help (coordinated with the doc-sweep story).
- [ ] `resolve_signature_gate` and `_signature_gate` deleted; the story/epic close path no longer references a signature gate.
- [ ] Shared signing machinery intact: plan-review claim gate and completion-verifier close gate both still function (prove with their existing tests green).
- [ ] `--force-close` / `--verdict-hash` unaffected; true-path tests removed/rewritten; golden help regenerated.
- [ ] `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass.
compiled_state.title: Retire verify.require_signature_for_close and its dead close-gate code
